meaning: n苏丹(某些伊斯兰国家最高统治者的称号)
examples: The first comer was the sultan himself.
"No," said the Sultan, "I will be true to my master."
Sultan and the cat soon came up, and looked about and wondered that no one was there.
Here great victories in battle were celebrated with lavish banquets presided over by the sultan.
In 2007, Chagaev pulled out of a unification bout against then-WBO champion Sultan Ibragimov.
